content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a pull request review request. The PR is an automated regeneration of static assets (HTML pages, browser app data) after gene review or template changes. It's a large PR with 174,609 additions and 1,280,888 deletions across 60 files.

b. **Request type**: This is a code review request. The user wants feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key information**:
   - PR regenerates 1292 gene review HTML pages and browser app data
   - Removes old MCP dashboard files 
   - Updates project pages
   - Large file changes primarily in `app/data.js` (data regeneration) and new HTML files
   - This appears to be an automated process triggered by changes to gene review data, schema, templates, or rendering code

d. **Main tasks**:
   - Review the changed files for code quality issues
   - Check for potential bugs or performance problems
   - Assess security concerns
   - Evaluate test coverage needs
   - Focus on the automated generation process and new HTML files

e. **Plan of action**:
   - Read key files to understand the generation process
   - Check the deleted MCP dashboard files for any concerns
   - Review some sample generated HTML files for quality
   - Examine the data.js changes
   - Look at the rendering/generation code if accessible
   - Provide constructive feedback on the automated process

f. **Limitations**: I can review the files and provide feedback, but I cannot run the actual build process or tests to verify functionality. I'll need to focus on static analysis of the generated content.
</analysis>

I'll review this automated page regeneration PR and provide feedback on code quality, potential issues, and best practices.

input.body: ### PR Review: Automated Page Regeneration I'm reviewing this automated regeneration PR for code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage. #### Todo List - [ ] Review deleted MCP dashboard files for any concerns - [ ] Examine app/data.js changes and size impact - [ ] Review sample generated HTML files for quality - [ ] Check project page updates - [ ] Assess security and performance implications - [ ] Evaluate test coverage needs - [ ] Provide overall recommendations [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23986994218)
